title: Runtime Desktop visibility status report
user_task: Given collaboration cockpit, Desktop coherence, fallback, and action-bound proof evidence, report which active Codex Desktop collaboration lanes are covered, partial, or blocked without performing any live control or GUI mutation.
allowed_live_behaviors: read-only status and proof summarization from public-safe structured reports
expected_public_safe_evidence: covered, partial, and blocked lane counts
lane-level source refs and public-safe titles
Desktop state per lane without raw window text or screenshots
source coverage for collaboration cockpit, coherence, fallback, and proof reports
execute=false next proof tool calls when a lane is blocked
actionsPerformed flags showing no live Codex control, no GUI mutation, no screenshot capture, no npm publish, and no GitHub Release creation
public-safe scan with zero raw transcript, screenshot, credential-like, browser-session, and path leaks
proof_boundary: Proves only public-safe runtime Desktop visibility status summarization across collaboration cockpit lanes. It does not prove live Codex control, Codex GUI mutation, prompt typing, clicking, refresh/restart automation, npm publish, GitHub Release creation, or unattended Desktop collaboration.
next_action: Use loo_codex_runtime_desktop_visibility_status after cockpit/proof inputs exist to decide whether the next safe step is more read-only evidence, an approval packet, or no Desktop collaboration claim.
